name: recoil_state_credits_destructor
description: RecoilStateCredits::~RecoilStateCredits disables and destroys the credits dialog when present, clears the dialog field, and restores the RecoilStateBase vtable.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_credits_destructor VC target.
Binary Ninja renders the C++ EH setup as explicit ExceptionList/var_4 temporaries; assembly and VC byte evidence validate the destructor shape.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4099f0 validates derived vtable install, optional SetEnabled(0), optional scalar deleting destructor with flags 1, dialog clear, and base vtable restore.
The native smoke verifies dialog and null-dialog teardown paths, including SetEnabled(0), scalar-deleting flags, dialog clear, and base vtable restoration.
